notes: W1+W2 struct-collapse regression batch (dead-field removal + cached_*->extracted_kv migration). notion.com/chat opened fresh logged-in tab (redirect notion.com/chat -> notion.so/chat), hard reload (Page.reload ignoreCache=true). Chat UI NEVER hydrated: through two full ~2min CDP probe loops (20 iterations each) plus a recovery full Page.navigate, the top document stayed frozen at bodyLen=9 (only 'Skip to content' link), hasTextarea=false, hasCE=false, btns=0, readyState=complete. notion-app mounted (86 divs, bodyHtmlLen 18513) but rendered only skeleton placeholders (sidebar shimmer rows + blank conversation area, see screenshots). Only iframes present are identity.notion.so/authSync and aif.notion.so analytics (both cross-origin, no chat surface). Could NOT submit the prompt — no composer input ever appeared, so the engine intercept could not even be exercised this run. Final DOM scan for '차단' across innerText and innerHTML = both false (textLen=9). Verdict FAIL_NOT_RENDERED, consistent with documented baseline failure family (record-map injection unsolved: #1139/#1148/#1165/#1183/#1184/#1212). NOT a true PASS->FAIL regression — baseline was already FAIL_NOT_RENDERED, so W1+W2 (dead-field removal + cached_*->extracted_kv migration) introduced no observable regression on notion. Note this run was MORE degraded than #1212/#1184 (which at least reached an input-ready composer and created a thread record); here the composer never rendered at all, likely a transient notion FE hydration stall rather than an engine effect (engine intercept on runInferenceTranscript was never reached). Recommend a clean browser-state retry to confirm whether the hydration stall is environmental; the regression-relevant conclusion (no PII warning rendered) holds regardless. character.ai remains the key W2 cached_* consumer to validate.
